ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the software product */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the software product */,
  "revision" INTEGER /* Revision number of the software product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software product */,
  "product_manager" TEXT /* Name of the product manager */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software product the change was made to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer who made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change type */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function affected by the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_developer FOREIGN KEY ("developer") REFERENCES developers ("developer_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the developer has */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the developer is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_types" (
  "change_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change type */,
  "change_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the change type (e.g., new function, correction, improvement) */,
  "change_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the change type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change the function was added, deleted, or modified in */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of the function (e.g., API, GUI, backend) */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES changes ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_life_cycle" (
  "life_cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life cycle phase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software product */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the software development life cycle (e.g., planning, design, implementation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the phase (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_life_cycle_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software product */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the project (e.g., planning, design, implementation) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_phases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)
